message:
fix(ui): apply draw_rect_filled to 3 remaining overlays

Three overlays (source filter menu, consent dialog, evidence ledger)
still used Block::new().style().render() for background clearing, which
only sets background color without clearing foreground text. Convert
them to the same draw_rect_filled pattern used by all other overlays
to prevent text bleed-through.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
